title: agrostis clavata subsp. micrantha
intro: Agrostis clavata subsp. micrantha, also known as a type of grass, is a lesser-known plant species within the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Agrostis clavata subsp. micrantha is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
